flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Columbus Technical College fell 49% between 2006 and 2009 (37.1% → 19.1%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Columbus Technical College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $7.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbus Technical College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $4.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 13 pp at Columbus Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (20.7% vs 33.9%).
